mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.real_name AS student_name, stu.student_number, c.class_name, t.real_name AS teacher_name FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN student stu ON a.student_id = stu.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON stu.id = u.id LEFT JOIN class c ON stu.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user t ON a.teacher_id = t.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance(student_id, attendance_date, status, remark, teacher_id, create_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{attendanceDate}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{teacherId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PRESENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS presentDays, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'LATE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lateDays, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'ABSENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS absentDays, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'LEAVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leaveDays FROM attendance WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND attendance_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
